name: roadie
description: Roadie — two strangers compose a song and ride along to it. MVP validation prototype.

scripts.dev:party: cd party && npx partykit dev --var FAL_KEY=$FAL_KEY --var MOCK_MUSIC=$MOCK_MUSIC
scripts.dev:party:real: cd party && FAL_KEY=$(grep '^FAL_KEY' .dev.vars | sed 's/^FAL_KEY[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*//' | tr -d '"' | tr -d "'") && npx partykit dev --var FAL_KEY="$FAL_KEY"
scripts.dev:party:mock: cd party && MOCK_MUSIC=true npx partykit dev --var MOCK_MUSIC=true
